# Flow Productions

> Portuguese creative agency in Faro, Algarve — design, digital marketing, audiovisual production, animation, and MarTech for brands in Portugal and internationally.

Flow Productions was founded in 2018. The team works in Portuguese, English, and French.

## Services

- [Design](https://flowproductions.pt/en/design): Brand identity, graphic design, packaging, and web design
- [Marketing](https://flowproductions.pt/en/marketing): Social media, content strategy, Meta Ads, and Google Ads
- [Audiovisual](https://flowproductions.pt/en/audiovisual): Corporate video, advertising, events, and photography
- [Animation](https://flowproductions.pt/en/animacao): 2D/3D animation and motion graphics
- [MarTech & AI](https://flowproductions.pt/en/martech): Marketing technology, diagnostics, and AI agents
- [All services](https://flowproductions.pt/en/servicos): Full service catalogue

## Company

- [About us](https://flowproductions.pt/en/sobre-nos): Team, mission, and studio in Faro
- [Projects](https://flowproductions.pt/en/projetos): Published client work and case studies
- [Social projects](https://flowproductions.pt/en/projetos-sociais): Creative support for NGOs and causes
- [Contact](https://flowproductions.pt/en/contactos): Get in touch with the team

## Content

- [Blog](https://flowproductions.pt/en/blog): Articles on design, marketing, audiovisual, and animation
- [Sitemap](https://flowproductions.pt/sitemap.xml): All indexable pages on the website

- [Homepage (Portuguese)](https://flowproductions.pt/pt): Main site entry in Portuguese
